properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Is there a heart that is waiting, Longing for pardon today? Hear the glad message proclaiming, Jesus is passing this way.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus is passing this way, This way, today; Jesus is passing this way, Is passing this way today.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Is there a heart that has wandered? Come with thy burden today; Mercy is tenderly pleading, Jesus is passing this way.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Is there a heart that is broken? Weary and sighing for rest? Come to the arms of the Savior, Pillow thy head on His breast.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Come to thy only Redeemer, Come to His infinite love; Come to the gate that is leading Homeward to mansions above.
